Evolution of the population in geographical space and time

You can find the original notebook here.


Distribution of births on world regions map

First, we plot the distribution of birthplaces, with the diameter of each circle proportional to the number of people born there.

Interactive map

We then group by periods and produce an interactive dynamic map

Choropleth static interactive map

Finally, we use regions to group births using a choropleth map

We can also add a dynamic representation of the evolution in time and space as you can observe on this map: Distribution of births in regions and periods
